real_estate_intro_1: Nyumba zakhala chikayikidwe chodalirika kwa zaka zambiri ndipo nthawi zambiri zimaonedwa ngati malo okhazikika osungira chuma.
real_estate_intro_2: Bitcoin ndi ndalama zadigitala zomwe zinapangidwa mu 2009 ndipo anthu ambiriso amayiona ngati malo osungira chuma ndi chikayikidwe.
real_estate_intro_3: Koma kodi katundu wooneka umasiyana bwanji ndi ndalama zadigitala ngati Bitcoin? Tiyeni tione kusiyana pakati pa Bitcoin ndi Nyumba.
point_1_summary_1: Bitcoin imatha kuyendetsedwa kulikonse padziko lonse pa intaneti nthawi yomweyo. Nyumba zili pamalo okhazikika ndipo singayendetsedwe.
point_2_summary_1: Bitcoin imatha kugawidwa kukhala zigawo 100 miliyoni zomwe zimatchedwa satoshis. Nyumba singagawidwe mosavuta - simungathe kugulitsa khitchini yokha ya nyumba yanu.
point_3_summary_1: Bitcoin imagwira ntchito pa netiweki yogawidwa yomwe palibe boma limene lingathe kulamulira. Nyumba zimalamulira ndi malamulo ambiri a boma kuphatikiza kulamulira malipiro a lendi, malamulo a kukhazikitsa, ndi eminent domain pomwe maboma amatha kulanda katundu wanu.
point_4_summary_1: Bitcoin sikufuna kukonza chilichonse - imakhala ngati khodi yadigitala pa netiweki. Nyumba zimafuna kukonza nthawi zonse kuphatikiza kukonzakonza, kukonzanso, kusamalira, inshulansi, ndi kugwira ntchito ndi olipira ngati zikubwereketsa.
point_5_summary_1: Bitcoin ilibe misonkho yopitirira - mumalipira capital gains mukagulitsa kokha. Nyumba zimaweruzidwa misonkho ya katundu iliyonse yomwe iyenera kulipidwa mosasamala ngati katundowo ukubweretsa ndalama.
point_6_summary_1: Bitcoin, ikasungidwa bwino, singawonongeke ndi madzi, moto, zivomezi, mphepo, kapena masoka ena achilengedwe. Nyumba zili pa chiwopsezo cha kuwonongeka kwa mtundu uliwonse.
point_7_summary_1: Bitcoin iliyonse ndi yofanana ndi ina iliyonse - bitcoin imodzi ndi bitcoin imodzi kulikonse padziko lonse. Nyumba iliyonse ndi yapadera ndi malo, kuyendera, ndi makhalidwe osiyanasiyana.
point_8_summary_1: Bitcoin imatha kugulidwa ndi kugulitsidwa 24/7 ndi aliyense wokhala ndi intaneti kulikonse padziko lonse. Kugulitsa nyumba kumadaliridwa ndi ogula akomweko, kumafuna nthawi yaitali ndi malamulo ambiri.
point_9_summary_1: Bitcoin imalimbikitsa umwini wachindunji popanda anthu apakati. Kugula nyumba ngati chikayikidwe kupitirira nyumba yanu yaikulu kumathandizira kulimbitsa nyumba ngati katundu, zomwe zimakweza mitengo ndi kuchepetsa mwayi wa mabanja, ndipo zikuthandizira vuto la nyumba ndi kusowa kwa pokhala padziko lino lero.
